calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-26-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: George E. Hays, in court, for and with Mary Y. Takata, via Zoom, Petitioner.

The court states that after having reviewed the papers submitted in this matter, the court finds that the form of title presumption under Evidence Code 662 has been rebutted by clear and convincing evidence and finds that title is community property.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-04-2022 Continued To Oct-25-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
